description: Style Note tonga gives the trend for florals a stylish twist with this empire line dress. Its blended fabric composition and knit structure makes the dress cling ever so slightly to your body, giving you a flattering silhouette. Pair it with shiny stilettos and long earrings to take any party by storm. Product Details Grey, pink and green floral print empire line dress with a V neck, three fourth sleeves, elastication below chest level with flared skirt Material and Care 95% Rayon 5% Spandex Hand wash cold Do not bleach Size and Fit Regular fit The model( height5'8"änd chest33") is wearing a size M
